category_sources: Official ktlint documentation covers linting, formatting, rules, API, installation, and integrations.
source_facts.description says ktlint is an anti-bikeshedding Kotlin linter with built-in formatter.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and repository use the project name ktlint.
docs_sources: Official ktlint documentation provides latest docs for installation, rules, API, FAQ, and contributing.
source_facts.homepage is the official ktlint documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official ktlint docs describe linting and formatting Kotlin files and rule configuration.
source_facts.description identifies Kotlin linter and formatter behavior.
